caption: The video features a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, wearing a white kurta and vest, with a neatly groomed white beard and glasses. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative vase with red flowers to his right. As he speaks, he uses hand gestures for emphasis, moving his right hand expressively while his left hand rests on the podium. The setting appears formal, likely a press conference or an official address, given the presence of microphones and the dignified atmosphere.
